description_long: This is a thick hardcover book with a glossy dust jacket, featuring a prominent photographic image of a historic stone fortification on the front cover, likely a castle or coastal defense structure. The book's spine is black with white and red text, and the top edge of the pages is slightly uneven, with a yellow bookmark or tab visible protruding from the top. The back cover displays a photograph of a modernist sculpture set in a landscaped outdoor environment, surrounded by greenery. The book appears well-used, with some warping or bending visible along the covers and spine. The overall color palette is dominated by dark tones, with photographic imagery providing visual interest on both the front and back. The book is substantial in size, suggesting it is a reference or guidebook, possibly related to architecture or regional history.
description: A thick hardcover book with a glossy dust jacket, featuring a historic stone fort on the front and a modern sculpture on the back. The spine is black with white and red text, and a yellow bookmark is visible at the top.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing black color with white and red text, and a small publisher logo at the bottom.
description_view_1: The front cover displays a large photograph of a historic stone fortification by the water, with the book's title and authors above.
description_view_2: The top edge of the book is visible, showing the thickness of the pages and a yellow bookmark sticking out.
description_view_3: The back cover features a photograph of a modernist sculpture in an outdoor setting, with some greenery in the background.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a color photograph of a historic stone fortification with a round tower and battlements, set against a backdrop of water and sky. The image is realistic and documentary in style, capturing architectural details and the surrounding landscape.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with vertically oriented white text for the title and red text for the series name. A small white publisher logo is present at the bottom, and the design is clean and formal.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small white circular logo is visible at the bottom of the spine, featuring a stylized design, likely representing the publisher.
